amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Annex V — paragraph 1 — point 4 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Annex V — paragraph 1 — point 4 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission



4 a.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

4 a. Where an AI system involves the processing of personal data, a statement that that AI system complies with Regulations (EU) 2016/679 and (EU) 2018/1725 and Directive (EU) 2016/680.

Where an AI system involves the processing of personal data, a statement that that AI system complies with Regulations (EU) 2016/679 and (EU) 2018/1725 and Directive (EU) 2016/680.
